commit.message:
fix(translate): move batching to frontend to avoid Edge Function timeout

365-day plans cannot finish in a single 150s Edge Function call.
Now the Edge Function handles ONE batch (offset/limit) and the frontend
loops through batches sequentially, showing real-time progress:
"Käännetään FI 60/365..."

Each batch: ~30 days, single AI call, well within 150s limit.
Partial progress is saved even if a later batch fails.

fix: cwd-dependent path bugs in post_completion and post_creation events

P1: execplan-event-post-completion/run_event.sh
    - to_plan_style_path: use REPO_ROOT instead of PWD to build absolute rollback path.
      Running from a subdirectory previously placed the plan under <subdir>/eternal-cycler-out/.
    - pr_doc_path: resolve extracted repo-relative path to absolute (REPO_ROOT-prefixed)
      before -f tests and fallback logic. Pattern already extracts the relative portion;
      -f against cwd caused false-negative in subdirectory execution.
    - fallback_path: build as ${REPO_ROOT}/eternal-cycler-out/... (absolute) for same reason.

P2: execplan-event-post-creation/run_event.sh
    - Derive tracking_path_rel (repo-relative) from tracking_path (absolute REPO_ROOT-based).
    - Write tracking_path_rel instead of tracking_path into the plan document to comply with
      PLANS.md policy ("no absolute paths in documentation").
    - Update rg -q idempotency check to use tracking_path_rel to match what is in the plan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Costume-theme matching, countdown variety, difficulty fix, vehicle scale

- Match backgrounds to costumes: cowboy gets wildWest (desert + sunset),
  Hawaiian gets tropical (ocean + warm sky), Chaplin/Waldo/hi-vis get
  stormyCity (dark city + clouds). Theme derived from costume index.
- Tiered countdown variety: 60% quick (1-2 beats), 20% normal,
  15% long buildup, 5% comedic ("Catering ready?", "Whose coffee?")
- Fix level 21+ difficulty regression: levels now continue ramping
  from where level 20 left off (no reset to easy)
- Scale helicopter and balloon 3x bigger for visual impact
- Water tank: solid walls, viewing window, opaque background
- Hat landing animation: starts from further away matching fly-off
  trajectory, longer settle time (2.5s) for smooth transition
- Shop rebalancing: each tier 20%+ better HP/$ than previous,
  rewarding saving up for expensive treatments

literal body, wraps it into a full script, and extracts the alias name
from the definition. Also updates `mcp alias edit` to create new aliases
with a defineAlias skeleton template when the alias doesn't exist yet.

feat: fix gSDE noise amplification (C1 L2-normalize + C3 cosine entropy schedule)

C1: Replace √d scaling with F.normalize(latent_sde) in robust_actor.py — guarantees ||latent_sde||=1 regardless of LayerNorm gains.
C3: Add CosineEntropyScheduleCallback (target_entropy -0.2→-1.0) with alpha_lr=1e-5.
Also: retry on empty yfinance DataFrame, monitoring metrics (latent_sde_norm_sq, layernorm_gain_rms), 12 unit tests.

vid läsning, (2) tysta API-fel gav falska nollresultat, (3) ingen garanti att
motivering byggde på faktisk CV-text.

- Use the template with checkboxes (existing behavior), OR

Also recognizes "## Test plan" as alternative to "## How to test".
This supports bot-generated PRs and external contributors.

commit.message:
GAAP fix: schedule rows only on lease creation, no upfront JEs

Per ASC 842, rental income is recognized as earned (month by month),
not pre-created for the entire lease term. This fixes:
- Performance: bulk-insert 60 schedule rows in 1 batch vs 120+ JE inserts
- Correctness: future months show as [Scheduled] without GL impact
- Eviction/early termination: just stop recognizing, no JE cleanup needed
- Lease creation is now instant regardless of term length

Schedule rows track the obligation. JEs are created via recognizeLeaseRevenue
when the month arrives. Security deposit JE still created immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add multiplayer, Supabase accounts, Wasteland dimension, and more

- Account system: create/login with username+password via Supabase auth
- Auth screens: create account, login (session-aware), auth checking state
- Multiplayer: WebSocket relay server (server/index.js), JWT-verified names
- Mode select: single-player vs multiplayer choice before world gen
- Wasteland dimension: radiation damage, hazmat suit, new biomes/blocks
- Possum Realm dimension with unique sky and brightness
- Grunture mob: bipedal/quadruped poses, fire spit, melee, roar
- Rocket launcher spawn loadout; nether portal on spawn
- Canvas resolution capped at 1280x800 for performance on large screens
- Remove void realm and void teleporter entirely
- Mobile: hold-to-mine delay, double-tap respawn, swipe hotbar switch
- Chat system with T key; multiplayer chat relay
- Background trees at 0.9 alpha; wolf mob with taming/sitting
- Supabase client (src/supabase.js) and auth helpers (src/auth.js)

commit.message:
Fix badge profil : déplacer profilPanel hors de #app (stacking context)

Cause racine : #app {position:relative; z-index:1} crée un stacking context.
profilPanel (z-index:80 DANS #app) était sous l'overlay (z-index:50 hors #app),
l'overlay interceptait tous les clics sur le panel dès son ouverture.

Fix : déplacer le profilPanel HTML avant <div id="app">, au même niveau que
configPanel et overlay (root stacking context). Le panel est maintenant à
z-index:80 global, au-dessus de l'overlay z-index:50.

commit.message:
Fix CSS cache: fingerprint custom.css via Hugo Pipes

Moves custom CSS to assets/ and loads it via extra-head.html
partial with fingerprinting, giving it a content-hash URL like
the theme's own SCSS. Browser/CDN caches are now busted
automatically on every CSS change.

commit.message:
Implement full effective Hamiltonian with MPO application

Production implementation of H_eff with proper tensor contractions:
- apply_H_eff_with_environments: Full effective Hamiltonian framework
- apply_2site_heisenberg_mpo: Proper 2-site MPO application
- Uses batched GEMM for H application to all MPS bond configurations
- Environments integrated into optimization loop
- All computation on GPU with rocBLAS

This is the critical piece that was missing - optimize_site now uses
actual MPO Hamiltonian instead of bare local term.

Next: Full MPO-environment tensor contractions with hipTensor

Fix showcase box height for no-set-time shows — fw-v130

Reverts the bad fw-v129 approach (removing overlay / hijacking cell header).
Instead, fix the endSlot calculation: when a showcase has no end times,
advance endSlot by numShows × 30 min from startSlot so the box height
scales with the number of performers (1 slot per act minimum).
7-act Spring Break @ Tweedy's: box spans 12:00 → 15:30 (3.5 h).

Showcase overlay, showcase label, and (No Set Times) header all preserved.

commit.message:
fix: eliminate filter flicker by fetching taxonomy server-side (SSR)

Add INTERNAL_API_BASE_URL env var to Docker Compose files so the Next.js
SSR context can reach the API container directly via Docker networking
(api_blue:3001 / api_green:3001) instead of using the relative /api path
that fails server-side.

- events/page.tsx: use INTERNAL_API_BASE_URL in fetchServerJson
- hosts/page.tsx: make async, fetch taxonomy server-side, pass as prop
- OrganizerSearchClient: accept initialTaxonomy prop, skip client fetch if present
- docker-compose *.yml: add INTERNAL_API_BASE_URL per color/service

All filter labels (Dance practice, Event format, etc.) now render in the
initial SSR HTML with no client-side delay or flickering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: MTU Trading Room application with Portainer deployment

Complete R Shiny application consolidating 6 financial analysis tools:
- Fundamental Analysis (P/E, EPS, Beta, PEG ratios)
- Technical Analysis (RSI, MACD, candlestick charts)
- Intrinsic Value Calculator (Graham's formula)
- Black-Scholes Option Pricing (with Greeks)
- Monte Carlo Simulation (1000 paths)
- Sentiment Analysis (NLP with 3 lexicons)

Features:
- Sequential workflow with tab locking
- MTU branding (gold/black theme)
- API caching (24-hour TTL)
- State management with session save/load
- PowerPoint export capability

Deployment:
- Docker containerization (rocker/shiny-verse base)
- Standard docker-compose.yml configuration
- Portainer-optimized docker-compose.portainer.yml
- Comprehensive deployment documentation
- Health checks and resource limits

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
